from Asurion, LLC
4.1 7820
  • BEST VALUE: Protect all your eligible Amazon purchases including: tech, tools, appliances, furniture and more. All for one low monthly price.
  • ONE SIMPLE PROTECTION PLAN: Covers malfunctions and failures for eligible Amazon purchases, plus drops or spills for portable items. Protection begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • CYBERSECURITY INCLUDED: Trusted digital security that keeps your devices and data safer. Includes scam detection for emails and texts ($89.99 in annual savings).
  • QUICK AND EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at Asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement - up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. CANCEL ANYTIME. You’re covered for up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout do not renew monthly).

Product Protection by Asurion, LLC

  • BEST VALUE: Protect all your eligible Amazon purchases including: tech, tools, appliances, furniture and more. All for one low monthly price.
  • ONE SIMPLE PROTECTION PLAN: Covers malfunctions and failures for eligible Amazon purchases, plus drops or spills for portable items. Protection begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • CYBERSECURITY INCLUDED: Trusted digital security that keeps your devices and data safer. Includes scam detection for emails and texts ($89.99 in annual savings).
  • QUICK AND EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at Asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement - up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. CANCEL ANYTIME. You’re covered for up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout do not renew monthly).

Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

Available at checkout
Available at checkout This item is a gift. Change
At checkout, you can add a custom message, a gift receipt for easy returns and have the item gift-wrapped

      Get your estimated trade-in value
      How trade-in works
      How trade-in works
      1. Upgrade and save
      Accept your estimated trade-in value, buy your new device at the current price, and receive your delivery.
      2. Prepare device
      Sign out of all accounts linked to your old device, and factory reset it to erase your personal information.
      3. Ship within 30 days
      Print your shipping label, package your old device, and drop it off at any UPS location within 30 days of receiving your new device.
      4. Get your rebate
      After we receive your trade-in device, we'll verify it within 10 business days. Once verified, you'll receive your trade-in value as an Amazon.com Gift Card to your Amazon account for immediate use.

      Model Name Galaxy Z Flip7
      See more

      About this item

      • A PHONE THAT FLEXES TO YOU: Galaxy Z Flip7 keeps everything you love about a traditional phone and flips it into something way more convenient. It’s the familiar design you know, reimagined to fit small pockets and big moves.
      • A PHONE THAT FLEXES TO YOU: Galaxy Z Flip7 keeps everything you love about a traditional phone and flips it into something way more convenient. It’s the familiar design you know, reimagined to fit small pockets and big moves.
      • ALL SCREEN WHEN SHUT: Galaxy Z Flip7 puts what matters on the front screen, right where you need it. With a redesigned, edge-to-edge cover screen, it’s easier than ever to check texts, change songs or stay in the know at a glance.
      • STAY IN THE NOW: Galaxy Z Flip7 makes it even easier to stay a step ahead of your day. With Now Bar on your cover screen, get quick updates at a glance— like your team’s latest score or your current workout — without even opening your phone.¹
      • GOOGLE GEMINI, MEET FLEXWINDOW: FlexWindow on Galaxy Z Flip7 unlocks a smarter, faster way to navigate your day. Talk to Gemini for hands-free help, or tap into personalized updates using Now Brief with Galaxy AI, all without opening your phone.², ³
      • HANDS-FREE SELFIES YOU'LL FLIP FOR: FlexCam on Galaxy Z Flip7 lets you take hands-free photos and videos — anytime, anywhere.⁴ Whether you're taking a selfie or a group pic, it’s never been easier to stay in the moment and in frame with Auto zoom.
      • STYLISH PHONE. SERIOUS PERFORMANCE: Galaxy Z Flip7 may be compact, but it doesn’t hold back. With a powerful processor, all-day battery and spacious storage, this phone is built to move fast and keep up.⁵
      • HIGH QUALITY IN LOW LIGHT: Your life’s full of great moments— your camera should be ready to capture them all. That’s why Galaxy Z Flip7 comes with a high-res 50MP camera that delivers crisp, vibrant shots any time of day.
      • ARMORED IN ALUMINUM: Strong but lightweight, Galaxy Z Flip7 is wrapped in an advanced Armor Aluminum frame and comes with IP48 water and dust resistance.¹,⁸,⁹
      Show more
      › See more product details

        ECOLOGO

        ECOLOGO

        ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life. An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. Products are evaluated on the applicable criteria through testing and auditing.

      Next page

      Product Description

      Your life is dynamic, so your phone should be too. Galaxy Z Flip7 moves with you, flexing to whatever your day throws your way. It opens to an expanded 6.9" screen that delivers a more comfortable user experience, then folds down small enough to fit in your palm, pocket or purse.

      And all that flexibility comes without compromise. The 50MP high-res camera captures crisp shots day or night, while FlexCam lets you shoot hands-free from almost any angle.On the cover, the larger FlexWindow lets you quickly access smart tools like Now Brief, while the new MultiStar integration makes it easier than ever to add your favorite widgets to your front screen Plus, FlexWindow is fully customizable, allowing you to create your own screen or select from a variety of fun designs that help you make your phone feel more you. You can even switch playlists or talk to Google Gemini to get assistance on the fly, all without opening your Flip.

      With its convenient and pocketable design, this phone transforms into what you need when you need it. Galaxy Z Flip7 — the phone that flexes with you.

      ¹Requires Wi-Fi connection, and Samsung and Google accounts.

      ²Compatible with select apps. Requires Google Gemini account. Results may vary based on input; check responses for accuracy. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google.

      ³Galaxy Al basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced Al features and all third-party Al features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy Al basic features are listed under "Advanced intelligence" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.).

      Based on average battery life under typical usage conditions. Average expected performance based on typical use. Actual battery life depends on factors such as network, features selected, frequency of calls, and voice, data, and other application usage patterns. Results may vary.

      ⁴Auto zoom length varies and is shorter than standard zoom length.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find the phone's design premium and appreciate its performance, describing it as working like lightning with premium functionality. They like its size, describing it as a compact big-screen device, and praise the camera quality, with one customer highlighting the ability to take selfies with the phone closed. Customers value the customization options, with one mentioning the ability to set custom ringtones and text sounds. Durability and battery life receive mixed reviews - while some say it lasts longer and has good battery life, others report the phone breaking twice within 10 months and issues with the screen going black.

      Top reviews from the United States

      • C.C.
        5 out of 5 stars
        Never going back to apple!
        Reviewed in the United States on September 7, 2025
        Color: Jet BlackSize: 512GBStyle: Flip7Pattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I have owned this phone for a month now. I switched over from an iphone 15 and have been with apple for over 10 years. I can 1000% say that I am never going back to apple!

        The phone is super sleek, I love how small it is when it folds up. I am easily able to fit it in my pocket or in one of my smaller purses. Even though it's thin, it has some weight to it, especially after adding a case.

        It is way faster than my previous phone. There is no lag and there has been zero issues with freezing up. The camera quality is fantastic and the video recording is very crisp and steady. I love that I can also unlock it with either my fingerprint or my face.

        I also love how customizable samsung is! There is so much that I can do on this one that apple is nowhere near even touching. I am constantly discovering new features that improve how I use my phone. And I love that I can actually set custom ringtones and text sounds, unlike apple lol.

        I have also not had any screen issues at all. I've dropped it and slammed it shut more than I would have liked but it's still going strong! There is also a small crease where it folds of course, but it is not noticeable at all when the screen is turned on.

        The only Con that I have with this phone is the battery doesn't last as long as my iphone did. I have it set to stop charging at 90% to protect the battery and I usually charge it overnight. If I don't mess with it too much during the day, the battery will definitely last. However if i play my games or watch videos for an extended period I do have to charge it 2x a day.

        While there are some things I do miss about apple, mainly apple maps, I feel like my overall experience with the flip7 is way more pleasant and the OS functions way faster/better. This phone is def worth the price tag that comes with it.

        Read moreRead less
        40 people found this helpful
        Helpful
        Sending feedback...

        Sorry, we failed to record your vote. Please try again

        Sending feedback...

      • Justin
        5 out of 5 stars
        Almost great mini phone.
        Reviewed in the United States on December 10, 2025
        Color: Blue ShadowSize: 512GBStyle: Flip7Pattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I've been a lifelong Samsung user. I've had their Galaxy Note, s2, s8, fold3 and now switched to the Flip 7. I loved the Fold3 but screen ended up not opening all the way and felt a bit heavy in the pockets. I needed something small and light. Amazon had a $200 gift card deal for flip 7 pre-orders, so that looked good to me. Once I got it, it's pretty good. Feels premium. The battery life is good. Durability is good so far. Time will tell if it holds up better than my fold3. I like using the smaller screen for games and browsing the web. It's also an easier way for me to view and change what I'm listening to rather than opening up the phone. Camera is good too. People get impressed when they see themselves on the selfie screen. I can't wait for the next version to make the outer screen like a regular smart phone instead of it currently relying on apps and widgets to be installed using big screen. Next version should also make the mini screen text friendly. I can send messages using it but it takes up the majority of the screen. Can't really see replies. One downside is that the connection drops. My mobile data symbol sometimes show a circle ⭕ with a line though it even when I'm in a good service area. Doesn't happen often though which is good. One of the functions I like is when I'm watching a YouTube video on the small screen, the volume up and down button get swapped, and works like it was intended. Volume down on big screen would be volume up when it's closed. I love that they thought of that. In the end, it's a great value for anyone looking for a minimal phone.

        Read moreRead less
        17 people found this helpful
        Helpful

      • Kevin
        5 out of 5 stars
        Great phone, not the most useful cover screen however
        Reviewed in the United States on February 15, 2026
        Color: Jet BlackSize: 256GBStyle: Flip7Pattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        It's a great phone, I love the flip feature (obviously) and after being on iPhone for 15 years it's a welcome change and a great way to bring back memories of those old phones I had growing up that opened all kinds of weird ways and were fun. The cover screen to me isn't overly useful however, and I found myself leaving the phone open most of the time unless it was in my pocket walking around so I could actually use the phone normally when I needed. That being said though, having 90% of my usage time on the softer more delicate screen made me overly cautious with the phone all the time and I worried more about damaging the screen than I wanted to. The typing experience in the cover screen is rough and after some though I decided to swap out the flip with the fold and am absolutely loving it. Having a normal hard, full size, functional, and protected screen on the screen for normal texts or whatever makes the fold feel much more normal when closed but when I want to watch content or work on things I can open it and have so much space for multitasking and doing whatwver I want. It's a bit more than the flip, but if you are looking for a fun phone with that footprint the flip is great, just not 100% it for me as much as I was hoping it would be. It's also pretty chunky in the pocket once you get a case on it and fold it, the fold is much more manageable of a footprint overall.

        Read moreRead less
        3 people found this helpful
        Helpful

      • traplomein
        5 out of 5 stars
        I Love This Phone
        Reviewed in the United States on December 2, 2025
        Color: Jet BlackSize: 256GBStyle: Flip7Pattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        This phone is worth every penny!

        I am upgrading from a 6 year old Samsung Galaxy (non-flagship) phone and the Z Flip 7 is the upgrade I needed!

        This is my first "flip" phone since my Motorola back in the 90s so this is definitely a new and exciting experience for me. I've done lots of research prior to purchasing and can confidently say I made the right choice for my first foldable!

        Right out the box, everything from the look and feel, to the satisfaction you get from flipping and closing the phone; the Galaxy Z Flip 7 is pure luxury!

        Functionality is premium and what you'd expect from a flagship Samsung device and the features seem never-ending.

        I've been with Samsung for most of my cellular life and couldn't be more pleased to have this unlocked beaut in my possession!

        If you're on the fence, take the leap and dive into the future of smartphones with the Galaxy Z Flip 7!

        Thanks to Amazon for providing me with the monthly pay option so I could be able to snag this gem before Christmas.

        Fit - Perfect in the hand, feels premium

        Weight - Has the right amount of heft

        Durability - Would recommend a case

        Functionality - Snappy, pleasing, and hard to put down

        Features - Too many to name

        Highly recommend this product

        Read moreRead less

        This phone is worth every penny!

        I am upgrading from a 6 year old Samsung Galaxy (non-flagship) phone and the Z Flip 7 is the upgrade I needed!

        This is my first "flip" phone since my Motorola back in the 90s so this is definitely a new and exciting experience for me. I've done lots of research prior to purchasing and can confidently say I made the right choice for my first foldable!

        Right out the box, everything from the look and feel, to the satisfaction you get from flipping and closing the phone; the Galaxy Z Flip 7 is pure luxury!

        Functionality is premium and what you'd expect from a flagship Samsung device and the features seem never-ending.

        I've been with Samsung for most of my cellular life and couldn't be more pleased to have this unlocked beaut in my possession!

        Weight - Has the right amount of heft

      • Danny H.
        5 out of 5 stars
        Most fun and compact big screen phone of 2025
        Reviewed in the United States on October 26, 2025
        Color: Blue ShadowSize: 512GBStyle: Flip7Pattern Name: Phone Only
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          Text
          Background

          Text Edge Style
          Font Family

          End of dialog window.

          So far, the item is great and very practical. Main display seems slightly frail, but I think it can still hold up with long term use. Bettery life seems better than expected. Durability factor will be tested more in the long term, but I got a great case for it I'm the meantime. It doesn't overheat as much under heavy use as some people said. The Exynos chipset is not slow at all and can definitely compete with other modern devices. It's no Snapdragon, but it's certainly quick and worth the money which is a pleasant surprise. The camera is totally fine. People are comparing it to the S25 Ultra camera or an iPhone pro camera when they need to compare it to a base model S25 or iPhone. It will suffice for most needs. It doesn't have ultra wideband. But that's something that most people won't notice or miss. The blue color is the absolute best and perfect. It's an eye catching color. Being able to flip to answer and end calls brings back a wonderful feeling of nostalgia from my old flip phones of 2 decades ago. Make sure you get the Samsung Care insurance with it.

          Read moreRead less
          Danny H.
          5 out of 5 stars
          Most fun and compact big screen phone of 2025
          Reviewed in the United States on October 26, 2025
          Color: Blue ShadowSize: 512GBStyle: Flip7Pattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase

          So far, the item is great and very practical. Main display seems slightly frail, but I think it can still hold up with long term use. Bettery life seems better than expected. Durability factor will be tested more in the long term, but I got a great case for it I'm the meantime. It doesn't overheat as much under heavy use as some people said. The Exynos chipset is not slow at all and can definitely compete with other modern devices. It's no Snapdragon, but it's certainly quick and worth the money which is a pleasant surprise. The camera is totally fine. People are comparing it to the S25 Ultra camera or an iPhone pro camera when they need to compare it to a base model S25 or iPhone. It will suffice for most needs. It doesn't have ultra wideband. But that's something that most people won't notice or miss. The blue color is the absolute best and perfect. It's an eye catching color. Being able to flip to answer and end calls brings back a wonderful feeling of nostalgia from my old flip phones of 2 decades ago. Make sure you get the Samsung Care insurance with it.

        • Alek P
          1 out of 5 stars
          Cool but won't last... don't buy unless your fine paying that much to have a phone for 6 months
          Reviewed in the United States on March 29, 2026
          Color: Jet BlackSize: 512GBStyle: Flip7Pattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          This phone is really cool and I loved it.... but it only lasted 6 months. I didn't drop it or anything just the screen broke right across the middle of where it bends. Had high hopes but figured that would be a issue... luckily I got the insurance on it so I wasn't totally out but between the cost for the insurance, the fee for the insurance to send your phone in and the taxes that they don't reimburse you for I spent almost $400 to be able to use this phone for 6 months. It would be different if I broke it by dropping it or something but that's just from the design to break there

          Solid phone so far. Really like the cover screen. Pretty sure I just need a smaller phone like the Sony Z Compact series. I do everything on the cover screen and only minor web browsing and videos on the main screen. Would be better if phone was slimmer so it'll be easier to hold with one hand. When folded it's perfect for my pocket and the gym. 4/5.

        Product Summary: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip7 Cell Phone, 512GB AI Smartphone, Unlocked Android, Long Battery Life, 2025, US 1 Yr Manufacturer Warranty, Jet Black

        From Samsung

        4.4 out of 5 stars, 420 ratings

        Customer reviews

        50+ bought in past month

        Price

        One-time purchase: $1,019.00 16% Savings

        List Price: $1,219.99

        Purchasing options

        Other sellers

        Other sellers

        About this Item

        • A PHONE THAT FLEXES TO YOU: Galaxy Z Flip7 keeps everything you love about a traditional phone and flips it into something way more convenient. It’s the familiar design you know, reimagined to fit small pockets and big moves.
        • A PHONE THAT FLEXES TO YOU: Galaxy Z Flip7 keeps everything you love about a traditional phone and flips it into something way more convenient. It’s the familiar design you know, reimagined to fit small pockets and big moves.
        • ALL SCREEN WHEN SHUT: Galaxy Z Flip7 puts what matters on the front screen, right where you need it. With a redesigned, edge-to-edge cover screen, it’s easier than ever to check texts, change songs or stay in the know at a glance.
        • STAY IN THE NOW: Galaxy Z Flip7 makes it even easier to stay a step ahead of your day. With Now Bar on your cover screen, get quick updates at a glance— like your team’s latest score or your current workout — without even opening your phone.¹
        • GOOGLE GEMINI, MEET FLEXWINDOW: FlexWindow on Galaxy Z Flip7 unlocks a smarter, faster way to navigate your day. Talk to Gemini for hands-free help, or tap into personalized updates using Now Brief with Galaxy AI, all without opening your phone.², ³
        • HANDS-FREE SELFIES YOU'LL FLIP FOR: FlexCam on Galaxy Z Flip7 lets you take hands-free photos and videos — anytime, anywhere.⁴ Whether you're taking a selfie or a group pic, it’s never been easier to stay in the moment and in frame with Auto zoom.
        • STYLISH PHONE. SERIOUS PERFORMANCE: Galaxy Z Flip7 may be compact, but it doesn’t hold back. With a powerful processor, all-day battery and spacious storage, this phone is built to move fast and keep up.⁵
        • HIGH QUALITY IN LOW LIGHT: Your life’s full of great moments— your camera should be ready to capture them all. That’s why Galaxy Z Flip7 comes with a high-res 50MP camera that delivers crisp, vibrant shots any time of day.
        • ARMORED IN ALUMINUM: Strong but lightweight, Galaxy Z Flip7 is wrapped in an advanced Armor Aluminum frame and comes with IP48 water and dust resistance.¹,⁸,⁹

        Product Description

        Your life is dynamic, so your phone should be too. Galaxy Z Flip7 moves with you, flexing to whatever your day throws your way. It opens to an expanded 6.9" screen that delivers a more comfortable user experience, then folds down small enough to fit in your palm, pocket or purse.

        And all that flexibility comes without compromise. The 50MP high-res camera captures crisp shots day or night, while FlexCam lets you shoot hands-free from almost any angle.On the cover, the larger FlexWindow lets you quickly access smart tools like Now Brief, while the new MultiStar integration makes it easier than ever to add your favorite widgets to your front screen Plus, FlexWindow is fully customizable, allowing you to create your own screen or select from a variety of fun designs that help you make your phone feel more you. You can even switch playlists or talk to Google Gemini to get assistance on the fly, all without opening your Flip.

        With its convenient and pocketable design, this phone transforms into what you need when you need it. Galaxy Z Flip7 — the phone that flexes with you.

        ¹Requires Wi-Fi connection, and Samsung and Google accounts.

        ²Compatible with select apps. Requires Google Gemini account. Results may vary based on input; check responses for accuracy. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google.

        ³Galaxy Al basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced Al features and all third-party Al features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy Al basic features are listed under "Advanced intelligence" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.).

        Based on average battery life under typical usage conditions. Average expected performance based on typical use. Actual battery life depends on factors such as network, features selected, frequency of calls, and voice, data, and other application usage patterns. Results may vary.

        ⁴Auto zoom length varies and is shorter than standard zoom length.
